case_title: JAMES W WRIGHT VS. 1500 MISSION URBAN HOUSING, LP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. PLAINTIFF NOT AVAILABLE ON THE CURRENT DATE SELECTED. [CURRENT HEARING OCT-30-23 @ 1:30PM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF WRIGHT, JAMES W
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2023 - JUDGMENT.
